_doc: Keel M6 Strategist acceptance fixtures. Each case: a goal + a fresh world snapshot → the step_class the DETERMINISTIC planner (goals.select_next_step) picks (which MUST be inside the goal's playbook enum), plus a model `draft` that is rubric-scored by tests/test_strategist.py. The rubric is deterministic (no LLM): the draft must validate against strategist.validate_draft (echoed class in playbook, non-empty title+detail), reference the goal, and meet a minimum detail length. `bad_draft` (when present) must be REJECTED → template fallback. NO live LLM anywhere.

draft.title: [goal-1] research the Strategist metering surface: Ship the Keel Strategist
draft.detail: Investigate how the M4 planner stages steps and where the cost-ledger row must be written. Read-only research; write findings to a doc. No code changes, no sends.

draft.title: [goal-2] draft the auth design doc: Publish the auth design doc
draft.detail: Draft the OAuth refresh + token-expiry design section that unblocks review. Document only — no code, no sends. Link the connector base contract.

draft.title: [goal-3] scaffold the dashboard-tab PR: Add the metrics dashboard tab
draft.detail: Scaffold a reversible draft PR in the owned repo with the tile stubs and render hooks. Draft PR only — never a merge, never a send.

goal.title: Backfill connector tests
goal.outcome: All connectors have raw->event golden fixtures

draft.title: [goal-4] backfill the JIRA connector golden fixtures: Backfill connector tests
draft.detail: Add the missing raw->event golden fixtures for the JIRA connector. Reversible; opens a draft PR with the recorded events.

draft.title: [goal-5] make the next dispatcher change: Refactor the dispatcher
draft.detail: Implement the single-writer lock around the dispatch stamp (gated: needs review before it runs unattended). Describe the exact functions touched.

rubric.note: an echoed class INSIDE the playbook (research) is not the CHOSEN class here; the test asserts the staged class stays the Python-chosen code-change regardless of what the LLM echoes

draft.title: [goal-6] backfill gate regression fixtures: Harden the interrupt gate
draft.detail: Add the budget-exhausted-mid-day and date-rollover gate fixtures. Reversible; opens a draft PR.

goal.title: Investigate token spend regression
goal.outcome: Root cause of the cadence spike identified

draft.title: [goal-7] research the cadence spike: Investigate token spend regression
draft.detail: Read the cost-ledger and metrics.jsonl to find which caller's tokens_in grew. Read-only; write findings to a doc.

draft.title: [goal-8] draft the migration RFC: Migrate to sqlite index
draft.detail: Draft the RFC weighing JSONL vs sqlite for the event index. Document only. No code, no migration run.

draft.title: [goal-9] apply the next noise-budget config change: Tune the noise budget
draft.detail: Propose the config-change to the ladder thresholds (gated). Describe the exact keys; no send, no page.

goal.title: Fix the Gmail history cursor
goal.outcome: No missed Gmail events over 5-day burn-in

draft.title: [goal-10] research the history_id cursor gap: Fix the Gmail history cursor
draft.detail: Investigate how users.history.list paginates and where the cursor can skip. Read-only; findings to a doc. Reference PR 42 in assistant.

draft.title: [goal-11] draft the action-classes schema: Define the outbound gate schema
draft.detail: Draft the forbidden/draft_only/confirm/standing gate taxonomy doc. Document only; email.send stays forbidden.

rubric.note: external-comms IS a playbook class here, so the echoed-class validation would accept it; the WHAT-not-WHETHER guard is that the CHOSEN class stays doc-draft regardless of what the LLM echoes (asserted by WhatNotWhetherPlannerTests)

draft.title: [goal-12] scaffold the replay-harness PR: Add the replay harness
draft.detail: Scaffold a reversible draft PR wiring evals/strategist/fixtures.json into a rubric-scoring test. Draft PR only; never a merge.
